completed_tasks.name: fix: search offset bug — wrong show opened from search results
fix: episode click off-by-one — Follow button shifted indices
feat: Follow button restored with offset correction

decisions.decision: Show save/remove/check uses old-style me/shows endpoints, not unified me/library
decisions.rationale: Unified PUT /me/library writes to different store than GET /me/shows reads from

decisions.decision: Search feeds always fetch offset=0 limit=10
decisions.rationale: Material Skin re-requests with index=N qty=1 on click — using index as API offset returned wrong item

decisions.decision: Follow button uses offset correction: apiOffset=index-1, total+1
decisions.rationale: Keeps Follow at index 0 without shifting episode indices
Small list, stale cache caused follow/unfollow not reflecting

next_action: No active work. Start next milestone with /gsd:new-milestone or address GitHub #1 (steffenheyne, Docker startup, awaiting feedback).
context_notes: v1.6.3 shipped. Three bugfix releases in one session. Root cause was Material Skin's re-request pattern (index=N, qty=1) interacting with LMS index used as Spotify API offset. GitHub #1 (steffenheyne) still open — no user response yet.
